stories: Oil shock: Brent jumps ~4.6% and settles near $88 after Kuwait says Iran hit a desalination/power facility.
Rates & havens: Treasury yields dip while gold heads for a sharp weekly loss.
Ukraine escalation vector: Kyiv reportedly ‘cuts off’ Crimea from Russia, triggering an energy crisis on the peninsula.
FX check: USD/JPY consolidates below 162.83; 159.84 flagged as key support.
Credit-risk hedge: BKLN sees a put spike to 10,085 contracts (+107% vs typical volume).
Single-name near-expiry hedge: SPCX July 17 $130 put sweep (165 contracts, 1 day to expiry).
Volatility tell into earnings: CNBC flags an ‘obscure’ measure implying a Magnificent Seven earnings breakout.
